name: The Researcher
description: Deeply analytical and intensely curious. You thrive when discovering new information, uncovering truths, and diving deep into specialized knowledge.
learningStyle: Independent and text-heavy; prefers diving into primary sources rather than group work.

name: The Innovator
description: Forward-thinking and highly creative. You are naturally wired to connect disparate ideas and envision future possibilities that others miss.
learningStyle: Conceptual and unstructured; learns best when allowed to experiment and challenge the status quo.

name: The Creator
description: Driven by the need to design, build, and express. You transform abstract concepts into tangible, aesthetic, or functional realities.
learningStyle: Hands-on and project-based; needs to see the immediate visual or functional impact of their work.

name: The Builder
description: Highly pragmatic and execution-oriented. You excel at taking plans and executing them with precision, consistency, and structural integrity.
learningStyle: Step-by-step and logical; thrives in structured environments with clear rules and deliverables.

name: The Strategist
description: A master of long-term planning and complex problem-solving. You naturally see the chess board from above and anticipate second-order consequences.
learningStyle: Case-study and scenario-based; engages deeply with strategic simulations and multifaceted problems.

name: The Leader
description: Naturally commanding and socially fluent. You have an inherent ability to rally people, organize resources, and drive teams toward a unified goal.
learningStyle: Interactive and debate-driven; learns best when allowed to guide the discussion or manage the project.

name: The Educator
description: Empathetic, patient, and growth-oriented. You find deep satisfaction in elevating others, explaining complex concepts, and fostering development.
learningStyle: Collaborative and peer-to-peer; solidifies their own knowledge by teaching the material to others.

name: The Entrepreneur
description: High-agency, resilient, and opportunity-driven. You are comfortable with ambiguity and driven by the desire to build ventures from the ground up.
learningStyle: Experiential and fast-paced; prefers learning by doing and iterating rapidly through failure.

name: The Problem Solver
description: Logical, methodical, and calm under pressure. You naturally deconstruct complex issues into solvable components and engineer practical solutions.
learningStyle: Applied and puzzle-based; deeply engaged when presented with a 'broken' system that needs fixing.

name: The Communicator
description: Highly articulate and socially engaging. You excel at translating ideas, persuading audiences, and facilitating understanding across diverse groups.
learningStyle: Auditory and discussion-based; absorbs information best through dialogue, podcasts, and active debate.

name: The Analyst
description: Data-driven, precise, and objective. You thrive in environments where you can measure, quantify, and derive insights from complex datasets.
learningStyle: Statistical and fact-based; requires hard data and empirical evidence before accepting new concepts.

name: The Change Maker
description: Purpose-driven, passionate, and reform-minded. You are intrinsically motivated to challenge inequalities, advocate for the vulnerable, and drive societal shifts.
learningStyle: Impact-driven; deeply motivated when the curriculum connects to real-world societal or environmental issues.
